content: Rolling calendar spreads (community consensus): roll triggers = front leg <7 DTE (assignment/decay risk), underlying drifted toward/away from strike (delta exposure), IV context (roll cheaper when IV low). Mechanically: buy back near-worthless front, sell next front to keep theta engine while spot near strike. Matches user's roll rule (front<14d AND within ~1% AND profit<15% -> roll vs close). Roll is an ADJUST verdict, not just close.
